remarks: Recently renovated, located in the heart of Norwalk, CT, North Seven combines community, nature, and forward momentum in an urban environment. Our cat-friendly luxury apartments boast impeccable modern layouts with new stainless-steel appliances, including an in-unit full-size Washer and Dryer, wood-finish laminate flooring, Granite countertops, kitchen island. 1 Glover provides numerous amenities that act as an extension of your home and help you add variety and quality to your day-to-day life. Enjoy games and entertainment in The Club Room, which includes a kitchen, perfect for entertaining. One Glover has easy access to major transit, fine dining, entertainment, and retail. Net effective rent based on a 24-month lease. Look & Lease special unlocks another $1,000.
